title: Fix to lint error on queue compared to int

features.name: find_first_index result assigned to int variable
features.description: Code should include a find_first_index method call on an array where the result (a queue of indices) is assigned to a single int variable

features.name: cross-module function call with array method and fatal
features.description: Code should include a cross-module function call where the called function contains a find_first_index array method and a $fatal statement

features.name: array find_first_index with equality in with clause
features.description: Code should include a find_first_index call on an unpacked array with a with clause containing equality comparison to a variable
